title: CSV data files not archived in run directory
evidence: data/kaggle/ directory absent from archive; .coverage file and .pytest_cache suggest tests ran during agent session but cannot be re-executed
suggestion: Archive data/kaggle/ with the run so tests can be re-executed independently

title: No explicit date range filtering on find_matches
evidence: brazilian_soccer/queries.py:90 find_matches() accepts season:int but not start_date/end_date; queries.py:38 _filter() only handles competition+season. R4 satisfied via season filtering per how_to_verify.
suggestion: Add optional start_date/end_date params to find_matches for finer-grained temporal filtering beyond whole-season
